allow: Bash(# Create portfolios and transactions curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""name"":""Tech Growth""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""name"":""Dividend Income""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/1/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""AAPL"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":20,""price"":175.50,""date"":""2025-06-01""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/1/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""NVDA"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":15,""price"":120.00,""date"":""2025-06-01""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/1/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""MSFT"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":10,""price"":420.00,""date"":""2025-06-15""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/1/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""AAPL"",""type"":""sell"",""shares"":5,""price"":195.00,""date"":""2025-09-01""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/2/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""JNJ"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":30,""price"":155.00,""date"":""2025-06-01""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/2/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""KO"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":50,""price"":62.00,""date"":""2025-06-01""}'' curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/2/transactions -H ''Content-Type: application/json'' -d ''{""ticker"":""PG"",""type"":""buy"",""shares"":25,""price"":165.00,""date"":""2025-07-01""}'' echo ""Seeded!"" && echo """" echo ""=== Tech Growth detail ==="" && curl -s ""http://localhost:3001/api/portfolios/1"")
